prompt: Describe the image in a long, detailed paragraph. Be thorough and cover the main subject, the setting, all visible objects, actions, spatial relationships, colors, and contextual details. Aim for a rich, complete description of the scene.

baseline.caption_ref: The image features two zebras standing close to each other on a grassy field. One zebra is positioned towards the left side of the frame while the other occupies most of the right side. They appear to be interacting with one another or possibly nuzzling their heads together. In addition to these two prominent zebras, there are several smaller figures scattered throughout the background, likely representing more members of their herd.
